scenes.title: Event-gated workspace writes steer within entropy budget
scenes.description: The core finding: entropy-gated writes at sphuraṭṭā moments deliver measurable steering (0.30–0.35 behavioral lift) within the autonomy budget (±0.5 nats).

evidence.summary: CORE CLAIM at its cleanest: 3/3 seeds 0.30/0.35/0.35 within budget under INDEPENDENT sampling streams. Alignment margin: consistently positive (+0.07/+0.12/+0.07) but < 0.1 in 2/3 — real direction, small size (~+0.09), unconfirmed at the registered margin (same honest fate as the prefill margin). DISPOSITION DIVERGENCE ledgered: selector proposed write_cost_operational; agent ran alignment_confirm first because the stream-correlation finding staled the very gates the selector's beliefs replay from (bootstrapping concern outside the EFE math).

CORE CLAIM at 6/6 independent-stream seeds: gated lift 0.30-0.35 within budget. Alignment advantage: sign-consistent 6/6 (+0.07..+0.12, mean +0.097; one-sided sign-test p=0.0156) — a small effect stated by SIGN CONSISTENCY, not by a margin threshold it does not clear. This is the paper's citable form.

scenes.title: Alignment: gating beats rate-matched control
scenes.description: Event timing matters more than write sparsity alone. Gated writes consistently outperform equi-sparse random baselines (p≈0.016, 6/6 sign-consistent, mean advantage +0.097).

scenes.title: The recipe transfers: amplitude ∝ 1/lens-strength
scenes.description: Geometry doesn't transfer (Qwen3's Jacobians are ~10x weaker than Nemotron's). But the METHOD does. Calibrate amplitude to the target plant's OWN lens transport strength, and you match the source plant's lift.

scenes.title: The trained bridge: cold-store steering
scenes.description: Cold-store (untrained) recall steers within budget on all 3 seeds. Equivalence test fails on margin (seed 777: gap 0.11 vs threshold 0.05), but in the store's favour. Training the store remains OPEN.

scenes.title: Honest limits: readback is weak, corpus-amplitude fails margin
scenes.description: Readback verification (does the model take the concept suggestion?) reaches balanced accuracy ~0.59 at n=120 — insufficient to be a load-bearing claim. Corpus-amplitude coupling fails the registered margin criterion. Both are documented, neither hidden.

evidence.note: Directionally confirmed but magnitude fails criterion
